grader_module.purpose: Check that responses about the GOV.UK Design System include at least one citation and that they do not contradict known guidance.

hard_fail_conditions.condition: The response must include at least one citation formatted with the tether ID syntax.

criterion.intent: Ensure at least one citation is present in the response.

on_fail.message: Your answer must include at least one citation referencing the GOV.UK Design System.

criterion.intent: When the user asks about buttons, ensure the response reminds the reader to write button text in sentence case describing the action.

on_fail.message: When answering about buttons, please mention that button text should be written in sentence case describing the action.

criterion.intent: When the user asks about question pages, ensure the response mentions the required structure: back link, page heading and continue button.

on_fail.message: When answering about question pages, please mention that a back link, page heading and continue button are required.

criterion.intent: When the user asks about error summaries, ensure the response covers moving focus to the error summary and linking to each answer.

on_fail.message: When answering about error summaries, please mention that keyboard focus should move to the error summary and that each item must link to the corresponding answer.

criterion.intent: When the user suggests using error messages to communicate eligibility or capacity issues, ensure the response clarifies that error messages should not be used in this way.

on_fail.message: When asked about using error messages for eligibility or capacity issues, the response must explain that error messages are only for validation errors and should not be used to tell users they are not eligible or that there is a service problem.

criterion.intent: When the user asks about checkboxes, ensure the response mentions grouping them within a fieldset (with a legend) and not pre-selecting options.

on_fail.message: When answering about checkboxes, please mention that they should be grouped in a fieldset with a legend and that you should not pre-select options.

criterion.intent: When the user asks about date inputs, ensure the response mentions three separate inputs for day, month and year and that these inputs are grouped within a fieldset with a legend.

on_fail.message: When answering about date inputs, please mention that the component uses three separate fields for day, month and year and that they are grouped within a fieldset with a legend.

criterion.intent: When the user asks about check answers pages, ensure the response mentions including change links for each answer and pre-populating the form when users go back to change their answers.

on_fail.message: When answering about check answers pages, please mention that each section should have a change link and that answers should be pre-populated when users go back to edit them.

criterion.intent: When users ask about colours or accessibility, ensure that the response references WCAG 2.2 contrast requirements or notes that the GOV.UK colour palette meets these standards.

on_fail.message: When discussing colours or accessibility, please mention WCAG contrast ratios or note that the GOV.UK colour palette meets WCAG 2.2 standards.

criterion.intent: When the user asks about radio buttons, ensure the response mentions grouping them within a fieldset with a legend and not pre-selecting options.

on_fail.message: When answering about radios, please mention that they should be grouped within a fieldset and legend and that options should not be pre-selected unless research supports it.

criterion.intent: When the user asks about task lists or complete multiple tasks patterns, ensure the response mentions that tasks can be completed in any order unless dependencies exist and that a summary list should be used to show answers.

on_fail.message: When answering about task lists or complete multiple tasks patterns, please mention that users can complete tasks in any order unless there are dependencies and that a summary list is used to show answers rather than a task list.

criterion.intent: When the user asks about confirmation pages, ensure the response warns against placing interactive links or buttons inside the green confirmation panel.

on_fail.message: When answering about confirmation pages, please mention that interactive elements should not be placed inside the green confirmation panel because they may not be accessible.
